summary: Full e2e test of Fork·Fate. All 8 backend pytest cases pass (restaurants CRUD, cuisines, spin with/without filters, 404 cases). All UI flows verified: hero + grid load with 12 seeded restaurants, filter pills present, spin-the-deck shows result card, cuisine filter updates 'spots in play' count and restricts spin to Italian, reset clears result, add-restaurant dialog with cuisine select works, delete via card hover button removes restaurant (toast + card removal confirmed).

issues: Console warning: Missing Description/aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility a11y nit

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription to AddRestaurantDialog to silence Radix a11y warning
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI in favor of lifespan handlers - works but consider migrating.
seed_db only seeds when count==0; safe. Uses uuid string ids and excludes _id in projections - good.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and axios; all interactive elements have data-testid.
seed_data_creation: None (SEED handled by backend on startup). Test data prefixed TEST_ cleaned up in tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_restaurants.py (8 tests, all green). Frontend: spin, filter, add, delete all working. Delete button is opacity-0 group-hover; hover the card first before clicking data-testid=delete-restaurant-{id}.
